---
title: "Individual vocal discrimination in non-Oscine birds"
image: "../images/card_pics/bioacoustics.jpg"
description: "This study tests whether non-learning birds can recognize individuals by voice alone. Behavioral playback experiments reveal the extent and ecological importance of vocal individuality in suboscines."
categories: ["Animal Communication & Contest Dynamics"]
contributors: "BCL"
feature_order: "k"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
